name: ROCK BAR | Harper King & Anna Vuong
description:
WLW ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ | ❝Ares & Aphrodite❞ 🥃

In an attempt to get you out of the house, your friend brings you along to their favorite spot, a shabby, underground rock bar. It's not necessarily your scene, the atmosphere foreign and intimidating at first, but of course the night takes a turn... for the better?

Your broken heart might be healing after seeing what seems to be the personification of Ares and Aphrodite. Vengeful and protective, they might be just the kind of medicine you need. Two is better than one, right?

And who knows, maybe you caught their eye too...
